majorFacilities.name: Mount Auburn Hospital / Beth Israel Lahey Health, Waverley Oaks Road

healthcareLandscape.dominantFacilityType: large hospital-affiliated outpatient and ambulatory care campuses
healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: Waltham has no full-service acute care hospital and no emergency department — Mass General Waltham states explicitly that it offers no walk-in or emergency services. The two corridor names are real street-level clusters, not formally branded districts.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
